boundary.generalOffTopic: I can only help here with your child's report, practice, and progress on the site. You can ask, for example: what to practice this week, what to try at home, or which topic to open as a short activity.
boundary.diagnosticBoundary: I can only refer to what appears in the practice data on the site. From the report you can see which subjects and topics to strengthen, but this cannot be used to draw personal conclusions about your child. If you like, we can focus on what the report does show: a strong topic, a topic to strengthen, or a small step for home.
boundary.healthBoundary: I can only refer to the practice data shown on the site. The report is not meant to draw personal conclusions about your child, but to help you see which topic to strengthen in learning. You can continue from here with a small learning step based on the report data.
boundary.privacyBoundary: I can only help with the report for the child linked to this parent account. I cannot show data for other children, passwords, user lists, or internal system information.
boundary.peerComparison: The report is based on this child's practice only and does not compare them to other children in the class. You can focus on what appears in the report and ask about a specific topic.
boundary.ambiguous: I couldn't tell exactly which part of the report you meant. Try asking more simply, for example: what is most important to practice this week, what to try at home, or which topic to open as a short activity.
boundary.noDataForRequest: The current report does not have enough information to answer this accurately. You can continue with a short practice session on the site, then check again whether a clearer direction appears in the report.
boundary.noDataSpecificForRequest: The report has practice data for the period, but not enough information to answer this specific point accurately. You can continue with a short practice session on the site, then check again whether a clearer direction appears for this topic.

utils_parent-copilot_intent-answer-compo.follow_up_after_3_4_days_like_this_then_: Follow up after 3-4 days like this, then check in the report if the accuracy increases or if the pattern returns.
utils_parent-copilot_intent-answer-compo.this_does_not_mean_that_there_are_no_suc: This does not mean that there are no successes - just that it is still too early to mark stable strength according to the data in the range.
utils_parent-copilot_intent-answer-compo.during_this_period_there_is_no_practice_: During this period there is no practice data on this subject in the current report.
utils_parent-copilot_intent-answer-compo.you_can_choose_another_topic_from_the_re: You can choose another topic from the report, or gain practice on this topic and ask again.
utils_parent-copilot_intent-answer-compo.the_subject_appears_in_the_list_but_no_q: The subject appears in the list, but no questions have been counted in it in the date range.
utils_parent-copilot_intent-answer-compo.in_this_period_there_is_still_not_enough: In this period there is still not enough practice data to recommend an increase or decrease in level.
utils_parent-copilot_intent-answer-compo.you_should_gather_more_practice_on_the_s: You should gather more practice on the subject before deciding on a level change.
utils_parent-copilot_intent-answer-compo.no_weak_line_stood_out_with_enough_pract: No weak line stood out with enough practice at the range.
utils_parent-copilot_intent-answer-compo.according_to_the_report_there_is_still_i: According to the report, there is still insufficient evidence for work above the listed grade.
utils_parent-copilot_intent-answer-compo.it_is_worth_gathering_more_practice_befo: It is worth gathering more practice before concluding on above-class ability.
utils_parent-copilot_intent-answer-compo.it_is_therefore_impossible_to_determine_: It is therefore impossible to determine direction from the current report on performance in this subject.

utils_parent-copilot_pattern-answer-comp.the_three_most_important_things_right_no: The three most important things right now are:
utils_parent-copilot_pattern-answer-comp.if_a_clear_sub_skill_appears_in_the_repo: If a clear sub-skill appears in the report, you should focus on it and not open several subjects together.

utils_parent-copilot_scope-resolver.in_this_subject_there_is_still_not_enoug: In this subject there is still not enough practice that appears in the report - you should choose a subject in which there is already practice.
utils_parent-copilot_scope-resolver.in_this_subject_there_is_not_yet_a_topic: In this subject there is not yet a topic with enough practice to talk about - you can try another subject.
utils_parent-copilot_scope-resolver.there_is_more_than_one_topic_here_which_: There is more than one topic here - which topic to answer?

utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.when_subjects_appear_in_the_date_range_y: When subjects appear in the date range, you can ask again and get an organized list.
utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.the_list_is_based_on_the_subjects_that_a: The list is based on the subjects that are shown in the report for the selected period, according to the order of display.
utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.these_are_the_summary_formulations_for_t: These are the summary formulations for the period as they appear in the report; For details by subject, you can go to the subjects screen.
utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.the_ranking_is_based_on_averages_across_: The ranking is based on averages across subjects with practice in each subject, not on the formulation of a single subject.
utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.when_practice_data_appears_on_at_least_o: When practice data appears on at least one topic with questions, you can return to the question and get a clearer picture.
utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.you_can_formulate_again_with_two_subject: You can formulate again with two subject names, or ask one question about ranking by difficulty versus relatively good results according to the data in the repo
utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.when_questions_and_accuracy_appear_for_b: When questions and accuracy appear for both subjects, you can ask again and get a direct comparison according to the averages in the report.
utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.in_order_to_differentiate_between_the_di: In order to differentiate between the directions, it is useful to also look at the number of questions in each subject and the wording of the topics themselves
utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.the_comparison_is_based_on_averages_acro: The comparison is based on averages across the topics that have practice in the report, not on the wording of a single topic.
utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.when_subjects_appear_with_subject_lines_: When subjects appear with subject lines, you can return to the question and get a practice rating.
utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.the_rating_is_based_on_the_actual_amount: The rating is based on the actual amount of questions in the period report, not according to the feeling of being overwhelmed.
utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.when_active_subjects_appear_it_is_possib: When active subjects appear, it is possible to identify exactly where the data is the least.
utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.this_is_a_sign_that_there_is_too_little_: This is a sign that there is too little data in the period report; In such a case, it is correct to be careful in drawing conclusions.
utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.this_is_an_answer_based_on_the_summary_l: This is an answer based on the summary lines in the report only, without inventing a direction over time that did not appear explicitly.
utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.when_complete_practice_data_by_subject_a: When complete practice data by subject appears in the report, it is possible to identify an area that requires attention.
utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.it_is_still_correct_to_continue_practici: It is still correct to continue practicing and testing, but there is currently no clear sign from the report of lack of clarity.
utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.the_identification_is_based_on_signs_of_: The identification is based on signs of doubt regarding the wording, it is still not clear enough or too little data that appears in the report itself.
utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.more_questions_and_a_wider_practice_sequ: More questions and a wider practice sequence are needed to reliably test stability.
utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.when_data_appears_for_two_or_more_subjec: When data appears for two or more subjects, you can ask again and get a rating according to the averages shown in the report.
utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.this_is_a_subject_level_description_from: This is a subject-level description from the report; For exact details by topic, you should open the subject in the report.
utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.you_can_formulate_again_with_two_subject: You can formulate again with two subject names, or ask one question about ranking by difficulty versus relatively good results according to the data in the report.
utils_parent-copilot_semantic-aggregate-.in_order_to_differentiate_between_the_di: In order to differentiate between the directions, it is useful to also look at the number of questions in each subject and the wording of the topics themselves in the report.

utils_parent-copilot_short-followup-comp.excellent_start_with_a_small_step_that_c: Excellent - start with a small step that corresponds to what appears in the report, without expanding beyond this wording.
utils_parent-copilot_short-followup-comp.understandable_we_stay_with_the_same_wor: Understandable - we stay with the same wording from the report and move forward with the next small step when appropriate.
utils_parent-copilot_short-followup-comp.there_is_no_long_paragraph_here_for_elab: There is no long paragraph here for elaboration - you can put in another word what exactly is not clear.
utils_parent-copilot_short-followup-comp.continuing_from_the_same_point_of_the_re: Continuing from the same point of the report - staying in the same picture without adding a new subject beyond what has already been presented.

utils_parent-copilot_truth-packet-v1.you_should_continue_with_a_short_and_mea: You should continue with a short and measured practice to stabilize progress in all areas.
utils_parent-copilot_truth-packet-v1.there_is_a_wording_here_that_can_be_refl: There is a wording here that can be reflected to a child in soft language.
utils_parent-copilot_truth-packet-v1.there_is_still_no_long_extension_in_all_: There is still no long extension in all subjects, but there are numerical practice data for the period.
utils_parent-copilot_truth-packet-v1.no_long_detail_shown_here_yet: No long detail shown here yet.
utils_parent-copilot_truth-packet-v1.still_lacks_cumulative_practice_for_a_st: Still lacks cumulative practice for a stable image.
